text: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
And the earth discharges its burdens
And man says, \"What is [wrong] with it?\" -
That Day, it will report its news
Because your Lord has inspired [i.e., commanded] it.
That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.
tl: Yawma-iziny yas-durun naasu ash-tatal liyuraw a'maalahum

text: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,
tl: Famaiy ya'mal mithqala zarratin khai-raiy yarah

text: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
tl: Wa-maiy y'amal mithqala zarratin sharraiy yarah
